properties.name: Ridge Motor Inn
properties.paymentRecipient: Ridge Motor Inn / Phil (Philip Patel) - philippatel84@gmail.com
properties.notes: KFI houses workers in 16 motel rooms. Two scanner snapshots merged: an older 6/9 email listing outstanding balances through 6/9 (rooms 134, 205, 305, 216, 149, 247) and a newer 6/11 plan that lists all 16 rooms with per-room catch-up amounts to bring everyone current to July 1 (total $40,808), then a flat $27,840/month for ALL rooms starting July 1. Per-room 'monthlyRent' figures below come from the older 6/9 outstanding-balance email and are pre-standardization; from July 1 the property bills a single flat $27,840/month, so unit-level rents will be superseded. AMBIGUITY: Room 205 was listed twice in the 6/9 email with two different amounts ($3,285 and $3,232) - kept as one unit at $3,285 with the conflict noted; duplicate 205 listing dropped. Follow-ups 6/11 and 6/14 chase deposit confirmation (unconfirmed). Property-level monthlyRent left empty because the per-room figures are transitional and conflict with the flat $27,840 going-forward rate - see bills[].

properties.name: Beau Chateau (Service First Rentals) - 501 W Fannetta, Dexter MO
properties.landlordName: Brandon Sparks (SMG MO) / Service First Rentals (Beau Chateau); coordinated via Lanyard
properties.notes: Housing Request #FR4R5Z. THREE scanners merged into this property: (1) 'Dexter MO Property 501 W. Fannetta Unit 10' new-lease record with landlord Brandon Sparks (smgmo.com), (2) 'Beau Chateau / Service First Rentals' record listing units 10, 11, 12, 16 at 501 W Fannetta PLUS a separate Dexter Grant Apartment unit A3, (3) utility setup threads. CONFLICT/AMBIGUITY: the two scanners disagree on the unit's move-in date - Unit 10 record says move-in 2026-06-16 (key pickup/walk-through 6/16 3pm) while the Beau Chateau record says move-in 6/15/2026 for all units. Treated all #FR4R5Z Dexter units as one property since same address/request; kept both dates per-unit. Dexter Grant Apartment A3 (15974 Co Rd 612) is a different street address but billed under the same #FR4R5Z lease/insurance package - flagged for review (could be split into its own property). Insurance: min $100,000 liability required (COI uploaded by KFI); special terms re microwaves + Section B insurance. Electric via Ameren Missouri (800) 552-7583 / (800) 552-7583. Rent and deposit are in the signed lease + banking/ACH attachments which are NOT machine-readable (need manual extraction). Lanyard bill.com invoices map here but specific invoice numbers were not tied to this address in email bodies.

properties.name: Lanyard Stays - Unmapped Rent Invoices (Bill.com)
properties.notes: Holding bucket for Lanyard bill.com rent invoices whose underlying property/units are NOT identifiable from the email bodies (sent via account-services@inform.bill.com, reminders via invoice@hq.bill.com, to ap@kfistaffing.com cc Whitmore/Hubele). Each is a separate Invoice_1110-XXXX.pdf with per-unit rent line items that are NOT machine-readable - amounts/units need manual PDF extraction. Once PDFs are read, these should be re-allocated to the correct Lanyard-managed properties (Virginia Manor #UT7ZZU, Beau Chateau/Dexter #FR4R5Z, Conley #3QRIW1, Sunset Place #D5CYJY, Hickory Haven). Only 1110-1293 exposed a total ($3,870.61). Invoice 1110-1263 ($7,791.35, due 6/1, $150 late fee after 6/7 PT) also has no named property in body. Invoices 1110-1286 and 1110-1292 are past due (reminders 6/14).

gaps: DUPLICATE/MERGE RISK - Dexter Grant Apartment A3 (15974 Co Rd 612) is bundled into Beau Chateau (501 W Fannetta) only because both share Housing Request #FR4R5Z. Different street address = should likely be split into its own property. Flagged but not actioned.

DUPLICATE/DOUBLE-COUNT RISK - The 'Lanyard Unmapped Rent Invoices' bucket almost certainly contains the actual rents for Virginia Manor, Beau Chateau/Dexter, Sunset Place, Conley, and Hickory Haven. If these invoices are later mapped AND rents are also extracted from lease PDFs, the same rent could be recorded twice. Reconcile invoice totals against lease rents before booking.
DUPLICATE NOTE - Ridge room 205 was genuinely listed twice in the 6/9 email; handled (one unit kept, conflict noted). Acceptable but the conflicting amount remains unresolved.

POSSIBLY DROPPED - 'KFI already has other housing in McKeesport' (noted on Virginia Manor) and '3rd apartment in Wausau' (noted on 1341 S 8th Ave) both imply additional KFI properties that are NOT in this roster. At least one other McKeesport property and two other Wausau apartments appear to exist but are not captured.
POSSIBLY DROPPED - Sunset Place is referenced as both Neillsville AND Thorp, WI; confirm these are the same property/request #D5CYJY and not two separate locations.

UNDER-CAPTURED ARRANGEMENT TYPES: (1) Hotel stays - Virginia Manor notes 'associate was in a hotel until move-in'; that hotel is a real (if short-term) housing cost with no property/vendor/cost captured. Ridge Motor Inn is the only motel/hotel type captured. (2) Pending leases - Conley GA (#3QRIW1) is application-stage only; Sunset Place 106 is Upcoming (7/8). These pending/upcoming arrangements are thin. (3) Expired/transfer units - Sunset 221/148 and Hickory Haven are vacating/void; confirm move-out costs and final bills are captured (Hickory Haven has a disputed full-June-rent invoice that may or may not be paid).

STATUS AMBIGUITY - Hickory Haven is marked Inactive at property level but the lease is 'Expired' and there's an unresolved decision on whether to pay Invoice 1110-1241 ($4,647.06). Open liability under an 'inactive' property.

SCOPE - St. John Properties (SJPI) is flagged as likely KFI's own commercial office lease, not worker housing. It should probably be excluded from the housing roster (or tagged non-housing) so it doesn't distort housing counts/rent totals.

suggestedFollowups: Extract rent + deposit from every lease PDF: Virginia Manor 506, Beau Chateau Dexter (10/11/12/16 + Grant A3), Sunset Place 132 & 106, Hickory Haven (Invoice 1110-1241), and the SJPI rent-change letter.

Read all Lanyard bill.com PDFs (1110-1263/1283/1285/1286/1288/1290/1292/1293/1297/1298) and re-allocate each per-unit line item to its property; reconcile against lease rents to avoid double-counting.
Pay/triage the two PAST DUE Lanyard invoices (1110-1286, 1110-1292) and decide on the disputed Hickory Haven invoice 1110-1241.
Resolve the three open conflicts: Ridge room 205 ($3,285 vs $3,232), Beau Chateau Unit 10 move-in (6/16 vs 6/15), and Ridge property-level rent (27840 vs 'empty').
Decide whether to split Dexter Grant Apartment A3 into its own property (different street address).
Confirm the implied missing properties: the other McKeesport housing, the 1st/2nd Wausau apartments, and whether Neillsville and Thorp are one location.
Capture the hotel/short-term stay used before Virginia Manor move-in as a cost/vendor record.
Add missing street addresses for Ridge Motor Inn, Virginia Manor, Hickory Haven, and Conley.
Map the Spectrum Enterprise internet account and the Wausau electric account to their properties.
Confirm Ridge deposit status (chased 6/11 and 6/14, still unconfirmed).
Tag/exclude SJPI as a non-housing commercial lease so housing stats stay accurate.
critic.overallNote: 10 records / 37 leases, but the roster is structurally rent-blind: 0 of 9 housing properties have a confirmed unit rent and none have deposits, because nearly all dollar figures live in non-machine-readable lease/invoice PDFs. The biggest risks are (1) double-counting once the Lanyard bill.com invoices are mapped to the same properties whose lease PDFs also hold rents, (2) implied-but-missing properties (other McKeesport housing, the 1st/2nd Wausau apartments), and (3) under-captured arrangement types - the pre-move-in hotel stay (no cost), pending Conley lease, and the disputed/vacating Hickory Haven invoice. Ridge Motor Inn has an internal contradiction (property rent 27840 vs note saying 'left empty') and three unresolved conflicts portfolio-wide. SJPI should likely be excluded as a commercial, non-housing lease. Address coverage is also weak (4-5 properties lack a street address).
